valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 12 Jul 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 13 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High Fair Isle 1034, slow moving, declining 1033 by midday tomorrow. New lows expected Biscay and FitzRoy, both 1010, by same time
